name: audio-meeting-minutes
description: Privacy-aware meeting transcription and evidence-grounded minutes from audio or video recordings.

interface.shortDescription: Cautious transcripts and grounded meeting minutes
interface.longDescription: Transcribe meeting audio or video, label turns without overstating speaker identity, and produce timestamp-grounded summaries, Q&A, actions, and uncertainty records.
defaultPrompt: Use $audio-meeting-minutes to transcribe this recording, cautiously label speakers, and prepare evidence-grounded minutes.
